text: Riya Sharma rented a flat in Bengaluru and paid a security deposit of Rs. 1,50,000 at the start of the tenancy. She vacated the flat on December 31, 2025 after informing the landlord in advance, but the landlord has not returned the deposit and is claiming repair deductions without bills or invoices. Riya has the rent agreement, move-out photographs, WhatsApp chats, and bank transfer proof for the deposit. No formal legal notice has been sent yet. Riya wants the dispute facts, dates, supporting documents, and evidence gaps structured clearly before preparing a legal notice.
